// Dashboard.js - Premium Stakeholder Version import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import './Dashboard.css'; function Dashboard({ dashboardData }) { const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('overview'); const [timeRange, setTimeRange] = useState('quarterly'); const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false); useEffect(() => { if (dashboardData) { setIsLoading(true); const timer = setTimeout(() => setIsLoading(false), 1500); return () => clearTimeout(timer); } }, [dashboardData]); if (!dashboardData) { return (

Customer Intelligence Dashboard

Advanced Churn Prediction & Retention Analytics

📊

No Analysis Data Available

Run an analysis to unlock powerful customer insights and predictive analytics

); } const { individualResult, batchResult, timestamp, type, customerData } = dashboardData; // Premium data structure const premiumData = { churnRisk: 16.1, riskLevel: "low", customerValue: 16250, retentionScore: 84, keyMetrics: { tenure: { value: 5.0, target: 44.4, trend: 'up' }, satisfaction: { value: 3.0, target: 4.0, trend: 'down' }, orderFrequency: { value: 2.1, target: 3.5, trend: 'down' }, lifetimeValue: { value: 16250, target: 20000, trend: 'up' } }, businessImpact: { estimatedCLV: 16250, retentionBudget: 812, potentialLoss: 2624, roiPotential: 2.2, retentionProbability: 0.84 }, riskFactors: [ { factor: "Tenure Duration", impact: 0.32, severity: "medium" }, { factor: "Satisfaction Score", impact: 0.28, severity: "high" }, { factor: "Order Frequency", impact: 0.25, severity: "medium" }, { factor: "Cashback Utilization", impact: 0.18, severity: "low" }, { factor: "Support Interactions", impact: 0.15, severity: "low" } ], recommendations: [ { action: "Personalized Offer", impact: "high", effort: "low", timeline: "immediate" }, { action: "Satisfaction Survey", impact: "medium", effort: "low", timeline: "1-3 days" }, { action: "Loyalty Program Invite", impact: "high", effort: "medium", timeline: "1 week" }, { action: "Account Manager", impact: "medium", effort: "high", timeline: "2 weeks" } ] }; const renderPremiumOverview = () => (
{/* Risk Score & Key Metrics */}

{key.replace(/([A-Z])/g, ' $1').replace(/^./, str => str.toUpperCase())}
{metric.trend === 'up' ? '↗' : '↘'}
{metric.value}
Target: {metric.target}
))}
{/* Business Impact & ROI */}

¥{premiumData.businessImpact.retentionBudget} Recommended Budget
⚠️
¥{premiumData.businessImpact.potentialLoss} Potential Revenue Loss

{/* Risk Factors */}

Impact on Churn Probability
{premiumData.riskFactors.map((factor, index) => (
{factor.factor} {factor.severity.toUpperCase()}
{Math.round(factor.impact * 100)}%
))}

Prioritized Retention Strategies
{premiumData.recommendations.map((rec, index) => (
✅
{rec.action}
{rec.impact} impact {rec.timeline}

))}

); } export default Dashboard;
